arena.info.subtitle: Rating, leagues, seasons and what you earn
arena.info.rating.title: Rating
arena.info.rating.desc: Your competitive skill level as a number. It changes after every rated match based on the Elo system — the outcome and your opponent's strength both matter.
arena.info.rating.win: Win against a stronger opponent — big rating gain
arena.info.rating.lose: Lose against a weaker opponent — bigger rating drop
arena.info.rating.difficulty: Harder tasks amplify rating changes (1.5x medium, 2x hard)
arena.info.leagues.title: Leagues
arena.info.leagues.desc: Your league is determined by your current rating. Climb by winning matches.
arena.info.seasons.title: Seasons
arena.info.seasons.desc: Arena runs in 4-week seasons. At the end of each season:
arena.info.seasons.snapshot: Your stats and league are saved to season history
arena.info.seasons.reset: Rating gets a soft reset (75% kept, 25% pulled to start)
arena.info.seasons.peak: Peak rating is never reset — it's your all-time best
arena.info.rewards.title: What You Earn
arena.info.rewards.peakRating: Peak rating — your highest ever, shown on profile permanently

settings.display.pixelScaleHelp: Scale of pixel art. 1 = native, 4 = HiDPI.
settings.display.reduceMotionHelp: Disables firefly drift and sprite animations.
settings.display.ambientSoundHelp: Fire crackle, coin clink, forest hum.
settings.notifs.title: Notifications
settings.gameplay.title: Gameplay
settings.gameplay.autoRaidHelp: Instant join when the guild opens a raid.
settings.gameplay.streakShieldHelp: One missed day per week doesn't break your streak.
settings.gameplay.showOpponentHelp: See when your opponent is typing during a duel.
settings.gameplay.hintFreqHelp: How often the AI mentor offers hints.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy

settings.privacy.exportDataHelp: Download a JSON of all your achievements, duel history and settings.
settings.keys.title: Keybindings
settings.keys.rebindHint: Click any binding to rebind. Changes saved automatically.
settings.access.title: Accessibility
settings.access.soundEffectsHelp: 8-bit cues for level-ups, duels and streak events. Disabled by default if your system prefers reduced motion.
settings.access.reduceMotionHelp: Disables firefly drift, confetti, sprite bobs and slide animations.
settings.access.highContrastHelp: Increases border and text contrast throughout the UI.
settings.access.largeTextHelp: Increases base font size by 2px across all panels.
settings.access.keyboardOnlyHelp: Adds visible focus rings and skips pointer-only interactions.
settings.access.screenReaderHelp: Adds hidden aria-labels to pixel sprites and icons.
settings.access.colourBlindHelp: Replaces rarity colours with shape + label combinations.
settings.access.contrastLevelHelp: Minimum contrast ratio for text on parchment backgrounds.
settings.lang.title: Language
settings.lang.uiHint: UI language. Task statements are always in the original language.
settings.lang.dateFormatHelp: How dates appear in duel history and event calendar.

reviewCard.unavailable: AI review is unavailable for this solution.
reviewCard.title: Solution review
interviewLive.meta.title: Live Interview
interviewLive.meta.description: A live practice interview with mentor chat and a shared code editor.
interviewLive.scenario.title: Connected Caverns
interviewLive.scenario.intro: Let's warm up with a graph problem. I'll give the prompt, and you walk me through your thinking before you write code.
interviewLive.scenario.question: Given an undirected graph of N caverns and an edge list, count how many connected components it has.
interviewLive.panel.hintsBody: Asking the mentor for a hint is free, but it leaves a mark on your score.
interviewLive.summary.body: Report will be sent to your inbox. Mentor score:
interviewLive.input.placeholder: Think out loud, ask a question...
interviewLive.followUps.directedGraph: What changes if the graph is directed?
interviewLive.followUps.complexity: Can you give the time complexity in terms of N and E?
interviewLive.followUps.parallel: How would you parallelise this for N = 10⁸?
interviewLive.followUps.constraints: Tell me more about the constraints you noticed.
interviewLive.modal.finish.title: End session?
interviewLive.modal.finish.body: Your code and transcript will be saved. The mentor will compile your score.
interviewLive.hint.response0: Nudge: think about how you'd track visited caverns. What data structure gives O(1) lookup?
interviewLive.hint.response1: Nudge: consider Union-Find as an alternative to BFS/DFS here. Would it simplify anything?
interviewLive.hint.response2: Nudge: trace through a graph with 3 nodes and 1 edge by hand — what does your algorithm do step by step?
